name: Priya Sharma
summary: Machine learning engineer with 5 years building and deploying ML pipelines at scale. Strong background in NLP and computer vision. Experienced with Google Cloud Platform and MLOps practices.

experience.title: Senior ML Engineer
bullets: Led development of real-time recommendation system serving 2M daily active users
Reduced model inference latency by 60% through quantization and batching optimizations
Built end-to-end MLOps pipeline on GCP Vertex AI with automated retraining

experience.title: ML Engineer
bullets: Built NLP pipeline for document classification with 94% accuracy
Deployed computer vision models to production using TensorFlow Serving
